description_long: This is a standard 12 fl oz (355 mL) aluminum soda can with a vibrant red, white, and blue color scheme. The front prominently displays the word 'SODA' in large, bold letters, surrounded by a circular blue and white graphic with the words 'ORIGINAL' and '70 CALORIES'. The can features a silver pull-tab on top for opening. Along the side, there is a vertical text indicating '70 CALORIES PER SERVING' and a 'NEW FORMULA' burst graphic. The back of the can displays a detailed nutrition facts panel and a list of ingredients, as well as a 'Please Recycle' message. The design is accented with geometric square patterns in white, blue, and red, giving it a modern, eye-catching appearance.
description: A colorful aluminum soda can with bold branding, calorie information, and geometric patterns in red, white, and blue.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large 'SODA' logo, 'ORIGINAL', '70 CALORIES', and the 'NEW FORMULA' burst graphic.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical '70 CALORIES PER SERVING' text and part of the nutrition facts panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, barcode, and 'Please Recycle' message.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the geometric pattern and partial branding, with less text visible.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Visible nutrition facts panel and ingredients list on the back of the can, including calorie count and serving size.
attribute_promotional_graphics: A 'NEW FORMULA' burst graphic on the front left side of the can.
